title: Nevada DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (Blocked — NV HR JS-only page pending)
description: Narrative research notes for Nevada DDS pay: administering agency (NV DETR Bureau of Disability Adjudication), unverified likely examiner/supervisor titles (Disability Adjudicator/Examiner; Disability Adjudication Supervisor) with grade/range TBD, the notable AFSCME Local 4041 (NSEA) Unit C CBA ratified August 2024 (newest US DDS CBA, enabled by AB 271/2019), and a record of blocked sources (hr.nv.gov JS-only, Firecrawl exhausted, AFSCME 4041 behind member login). Zero quantitative data retrieved. Companion to NV/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Nevada Division of Human Resource Management / AFSCME Local 4041 (NSEA); NV Dept of Employment, Training and Rehabilitation (DETR) Bureau of Disability Adjudication
